Why This Chapter Improved / Declined

Loc 4 shows — when the explanation references only an accuracy % (e.g. "stable at 19.2% accuracy"). This is expected and correct.
ChapterChange (Card)HeadingExplanation TextExtracted %
1. Determinants▲ IMPROVED
Determinants▲ +20%Why this chapter improvedGreat progress! This chapter improved significantly by 20.0%. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Applications (Area, Cramer’s Rule, Linear Equations using inverse matrices)' and 'Adjoint & Inverse'.▲ +20.0%
2. Application of Derivatives▲ IMPROVED
Application of Derivatives▲ +19.8%Why this chapter improvedGreat progress! This chapter improved significantly by 19.8%. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Maxima & Minima real life Applications' and 'Rate of Change'. Fewer students are struggling now (17 → 14). However, 'Maxima & Minima real life Applications' still needs attention.▲ +19.8%
3. Continuity & Differentiability▲ IMPROVED
Continuity & Differentiability▲ +10.6%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 10.6% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Parametric & Implicit Differentiation' and 'Second Order Derivative'. However, 'Derivatives of Inverse Trig Functions' and 'Exponential & Logarithmic Functions/Logarithmic Properties' still need attention.▲ +10.6%
4. Relations & Functions▲ IMPROVED
Relations & Functions▲ +9.5%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 9.5% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Types of Relations'. However, 'Types of Functions' still needs attention.▲ +9.5%
5. Integrals▲ IMPROVED
Integrals▲ +4.8%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 4.8% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Partial Fractions'. However, 'Integration by Substitution' and 'Rules of integrals' still need attention.▲ +4.8%
6. Application of Integrals▲ IMPROVED
Application of Integrals▲ +2.8%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 2.8% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Area under Curves'.▲ +2.8%
7. Linear Programming▼ DECLINED
Linear Programming▼ -2.4%Why this chapter declinedThere was a slight decline of 2.4% in this chapter. Struggling students increased from 8 to 12 and need focused intervention.▼ -2.4%
8. Inverse Trigonometric Functions▼ DECLINED
Inverse Trigonometric Functions▼ -5.8%Why this chapter declinedThere was a slight decline of 5.8% in this chapter. Struggling students increased from 4 to 12 and need focused intervention.▼ -5.8%

Matrices▼ -11.6%Why this chapter declinedPerformance declined by 11.6% compared to Midterm. 'Transpose, Symmetric & Skew-symmetric' remains weak and needs reteaching. Struggling students increased from 4 to 11 and need focused intervention.▼ -11.6%

Why This Chapter Improved / Declined

Loc 4 shows — when the explanation references only an accuracy % (e.g. "stable at 19.2% accuracy"). This is expected and correct.
ChapterChange (Card)HeadingExplanation TextExtracted %
1. Integrals▲ IMPROVED
Integrals▲ +10.6%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 10.6% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Partial Fractions'. Fewer students are struggling now (26 → 18). However, 'Integration by Substitution' and 'Rules of integrals' still need attention.▲ +10.6%
2. Determinants▲ IMPROVED
Determinants▲ +9.5%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 9.5% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Adjoint & Inverse' and 'Determinant of a Matrix'. Fewer students are struggling now (14 → 7).▲ +9.5%
3. Application of Derivatives▲ IMPROVED
Application of Derivatives▲ +9.4%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 9.4% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Maxima & Minima real life Applications' and 'Rate of Change'. Fewer students are struggling now (30 → 18). However, 'Maxima & Minima real life Applications' still needs attention.▲ +9.4%
4. Relations & Functions▼ DECLINED
Relations & Functions▼ -0.8%Why this chapter declinedPerformance remained stable at around 39.1% accuracy. Students are comfortable with 'Types of Relations'. However, 'Types of Functions' remains weak and should be revisited.▼ 39.1%
accuracy in why-text

Application of Integrals▼ -1.9%Why this chapter declinedPerformance remained stable at around 52.4% accuracy.▼ 52.4%

1. Application of Derivatives▲ IMPROVED
Application of Derivatives▲ +17.5%Why this chapter improvedGreat progress! This chapter improved significantly by 17.5%. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Maxima & Minima real life Applications' and 'Rate of Change'. Fewer students are struggling now (20 → 11).▲ +17.5%
2. Relations & Functions▲ IMPROVED
Relations & Functions▲ +13.6%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 13.6% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Types of Functions' and 'Types of Relations'. Fewer students are struggling now (14 → 7).▲ +13.6%
3. Determinants▲ IMPROVED
Determinants▲ +10.1%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 10.1% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Adjoint & Inverse' and 'Determinant of a Matrix'. Fewer students are struggling now (10 → 5).▲ +10.1%
4. Continuity & Differentiability▲ IMPROVED
Continuity & Differentiability▲ +8.2%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 8.2% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Parametric & Implicit Differentiation' and 'Second Order Derivative'. 'Continuity' is now a strong area. Fewer students are struggling now (9 → 5).▲ +8.2%
5. Integrals▲ IMPROVED
Integrals▲ +3.7%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 3.7% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Partial Fractions'. Fewer students are struggling now (17 → 13). However, 'Integration by Substitution' and 'Rules of integrals' still need attention.▲ +3.7%
6. Linear Programming▲ IMPROVED
Linear Programming▲ +3.3%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 3.3% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Graphical method of solution for problems in two variables'.▲ +3.3%

1. Determinants▲ IMPROVED
Determinants▲ +13.4%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 13.4% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Adjoint & Inverse' and 'Determinant of a Matrix'. Fewer students are struggling now (18 → 8).▲ +13.4%
2. Application of Derivatives▲ IMPROVED
Application of Derivatives▲ +12.3%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 12.3% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Rate of Change'. Fewer students are struggling now (30 → 20). However, 'Maxima & Minima real life Applications' still needs attention.▲ +12.3%
3. Continuity & Differentiability▲ IMPROVED
Continuity & Differentiability▲ +11.5%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 11.5% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Parametric & Implicit Differentiation' and 'Second Order Derivative'. Fewer students are struggling now (22 → 12). However, 'Derivatives of Inverse Trig Functions' and 'Exponential & Logarithmic Functions/Logarithmic Properties' still need attention.▲ +11.5%
4. Linear Programming▲ IMPROVED
Linear Programming▲ +9.7%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 9.7% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Graphical method of solution for problems in two variables'. Fewer students are struggling now (16 → 7).▲ +9.7%
5. Matrices▲ IMPROVED
Matrices▲ +6.4%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 6.4% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Matrix Operations'. Fewer students are struggling now (8 → 3).▲ +6.4%
6. Relations & Functions▲ IMPROVED
Relations & Functions▲ +4.4%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 4.4% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Types of Relations'. However, 'Types of Functions' still needs attention.▲ +4.4%
7. Application of Integrals▲ IMPROVED
Application of Integrals▲ +1.9%Why this chapter improvedPerformance remained stable at around 52.9% accuracy.▲ 52.9%

Why This Chapter Improved / Declined

Loc 4 shows — when the explanation references only an accuracy % (e.g. "stable at 19.2% accuracy"). This is expected and correct.
ChapterChange (Card)HeadingExplanation TextExtracted %
1. Determinants▲ IMPROVED
Determinants▲ +10.4%Why this chapter improvedGood improvement of 10.4% in this chapter. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Applications (Area, Cramer’s Rule, Linear Equations using inverse matrices)' and 'Adjoint & Inverse'. Fewer students are struggling now (19 → 13). However, 'Determinant of a Matrix' still needs attention.▲ +10.4%
2. Continuity & Differentiability▲ IMPROVED
Continuity & Differentiability▲ +2.9%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 2.9% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Second Order Derivative' and 'Continuity'. Fewer students are struggling now (24 → 19). However, 'Derivatives of Inverse Trig Functions' and 'Exponential & Logarithmic Functions/Logarithmic Properties' still need attention.▲ +2.9%
3. Integrals▲ IMPROVED
Integrals▲ +2.4%Why this chapter improvedSlight improvement of 2.4% as students are making progress. Students have strengthened their understanding of 'Partial Fractions'. Fewer students are struggling now (25 → 21). However, 'Integration by Substitution' and 'Rules of integrals' still need attention.▲ +2.4%
4. Linear Programming▲ IMPROVED
Linear Programming▲ +1.4%Why this chapter improvedPerformance remained stable at around 48.2% accuracy. However, 'Graphical method of solution for problems in two variables' remains weak and should be revisited.▲ 48.2%
